findings.evidence: `rg` shows the file imports `TauCeti.Probability.Exchangeability.Basic` and defines only `shift`, `prefixProj`, `pathLaw`, and `blockLaw` lemmas; `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability/README.md:198` lists Layer 2 as `Exchangeability/PathSpace/*.lean`.
findings.fix: Move the file to `TauCeti/Probability/Exchangeability/PathSpace/Shift.lean` and update imports/aggregators accordingly; keep only truly generic, broadly reusable `shift` facts next to `shift` in `Exchangeability/Basic.lean` if needed.
findings.issue: This creates `TauCeti/Probability/PathSpace/Shift.lean` even though every declaration extends the exchangeability path-space API from `TauCeti.Probability.Exchangeability.Basic`, and the roadmap places Layer 2 path-space material under `Exchangeability/PathSpace/*.lean`.

summary: The new API is placed in a non-canonical subtree for the exchangeability roadmap material it extends.
